title: CMS-powered Website with Payload CMS
description: Full route from zero to a production CMS website: UI, Payload CMS content management, S3 media storage, transactional email, error monitoring, and Vercel deployment.

steps.description: Bootstrap a Next.js App Router project with TypeScript
Install shadcn/ui component library for the public-facing frontend
Install Payload CMS — content collections, admin panel, built-in auth for editors
Wire S3 or Cloudflare R2 as the Payload media adapter for image and file uploads
Transactional email for contact forms, newsletter sign-ups, and editor notifications
Error monitoring for both the Next.js frontend and Payload API
CI pipeline: TypeScript check, lint, and build verification on every push
Deploy to Vercel with environment variables for the Payload secret and database URL
